arguments.content:
# API Review Meeting Notes

**Meeting Date**: March 23, 2026  
**Meeting Time**: 15:00 CST  
**Location**: Conference Room

---

## Participants

| Name | Role |
|------|------|
| Sarah | Tech Lead |
| Mike | Backend Engineer |
| Lisa | Frontend Engineer |
| Tom | DevOps Engineer |

---

## Discussion Points

### 1. API Versioning Strategy
- Reviewed current state of API endpoints across all versions
- Identified challenges with maintaining v1 endpoints due to technical debt
- Discussed migration timeline feasibility for client transitions

### 2. v1 Endpoint Deprecation
- Current v1 endpoints are becoming increasingly difficult to maintain
- Proposed deprecation timeline: end of Q2 2026 (June 30, 2026)
- Migration window: 3 months for clients to transition to newer versions
- Impact assessment: All active clients currently using v1 endpoints

### 3. v2.3 Authentication Updates
- New authentication flow agreed upon: OAuth2 with JWT tokens
- Rationale: Enhanced security, better session management, industry standard compliance
- Backward compatibility to be maintained through v2.2 endpoints
- Existing API key authentication will be phased out in v2.3

### 4. Rate Limiting Policy Changes
- Current rate limiting insufficient for growing traffic patterns
- New tiered structure approved:
  - **Free Tier**: 1,000 requests per hour
  - **Paid Tier**: 10,000 requests per hour
- Implementation to include proper HTTP 429 response handling

---

## Decisions Made

| Decision | Details | Approved By |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| Deprecate v1 endpoints | End of Q2 2026 (June 30, 2026) | All attendees |
| OAuth2 + JWT for v2.3 | Required authentication method for v2.3+ | All attendees |
| Tiered rate limiting | 1k/10k per hour structure | All attendees |
| Maintain v2.2 compatibility | Backward support through v2.2 | All attendees |

---

## Action Items

| Task | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|------|-------|----------|--------|
| Draft migration guide for v1 to v2.x | Mike | March 20, 2026 | Pending |
| Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 authentication | Lisa | March 22, 2026 | Pending |
| Set up staging environment for v2.3 testing | Tom | March 24, 2026 | Pending |
| Communicate deprecation plan to stakeholders | Sarah | March 19, 2026 | Pending |

---

## Next Steps

1. Complete all action items by respective due dates
2. Schedule follow-up review meeting for March 25 to track progress
3. Prepare stakeholder communication materials
4. Begin SDK documentation updates

---

**Notes Recorded By**: Alex Zhang  
**Date Recorded**: March 24, 2026

**Key Discussion Points**:
- API versioning strategy review
- v1 endpoint deprecation plan (end of Q2 2026)
- OAuth2 + JWT authentication for v2.3

The notes are formatted professionally with tables for easy reference and include next steps for follow-up.
